CHANGE RECORD 
 
When the quality of the products changes, the QuID is updated and a row is added to this table. The 
third column specifies which sections or sub-sections have been updated. The fourth column should 
mention the version of the product to which the change applies.

RMSD Root Mean Square Difference 
 
KEY DEFINITIONS 
Hs Significant wave height  is related to the wave energy integrated over all directions and 
frequencies (Eq. 6). This commonly corresponds to the average height of the highest 33% of 
waves. 
Tp Peak period  defines the period where the maximum of the 1-dimensional spectrum is 
located (Eq. 7).

I EXECUTIVE SUMMARY 
I.1 Products covered by this document 
This document covers the CMEMS product: 
ARCTIC_MULTIYEAR_WAV_002_013 which is a multi-year product of ocean wave parameters for the Arctic.  
The product is produced by the Arctic Monitoring and Forecasting Centre (Arctic MFC) using the WAM 
numerical prediction model, 
The product covers the Arctic region within the time period 19 64-01-01 to 2025-03-31. The product which 
has two datasets is available from the Copernicus Marine Service Catalogue. 
Dataset cmems_mod_arc_wav_my_3km_PT1H-i 
This dataset contains results for the full time period with a temporal resolution of 1 hour , as instantaneous 
fields. We assess the product quality in terms of significant
